team_chat_note:
TLDR: Strong apparent fit on written evidence, with several JD/rubric signals present.
Estimated match: 92%

- Evidence: meets or likely meets the 3+ years UI/UX requirement.
- Strengths: has some business/revenue or conversion-related signal; shows matching/recommendation/networking-related signal; shows data/research or hypothesis-driven work signal.
- Gaps / follow-up: paywall/subscription/premium-conversion UX is not clearly shown.
strict_team_chat_note:
TLDR: Partial fit; useful UI/UX signal, but core JD/rubric evidence is incomplete.
Strict estimated match: 58%

- Evidence: direct matching-platform / 1:1 matching keyword signal; conversion, subscription, paywall, or revenue keyword signal; data, research, hypothesis, A/B test, or usability keyword signal; product planning, UX structure, or ownership keyword signal.
- Strong signals: direct matching / 1:1 / matching-platform signal appears; conversion/subscription/paywall/revenue signal appears; some data/research/hypothesis signal appears.
- Main concerns: 3+ years UI/UX experience is not clearly proven in extracted text.
